steps.title: Identify the frequency signal
steps.content: The key signal: “relatively rare for supporters of the railroad to be secretive about their antislavery views.”

steps.title: Apply the frequency signal
steps.content: ”More often” directly matches this signal by inverting the frequency — if secretive supporters were rare, then more often they were vocal abolitionists like LeMoyne. The other three choices don't address the frequency relationship; they appeal instead to appropriateness, concession, or exemplification. That matches choice C — C is correct.
